title: 2 Pcs Gold Engagement Banners, Engaged Bunting Letters & Diamond Ring Party Decoration Props for Wedding, Proposal Engagement Party
features: WHAT YOU WILL GET - This package includes 2 banners. 1 'Engagement' letter banner with diamond ring, 1 triangle banner and 2 rolls of cuttable connecting string
HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL - The engagement banner is made from strong gold foil paper which is not easy to break. The colours do not peel off easily, making it an ideal decorative item
EASY TO INSTALL - Our banner is not yet finished, you will need the included string to assemble it. Each banner has multiple small holes so you can easily assemble it
BRILLIANT COLOURS - These gold banners sparkle and are very eye-catching. It can add a romantic atmosphere to surprise your fiancé or fiancée and enjoy a happy moment
WIDE RANGE OF APPLICATIONS - Suitable for engagements, proposals and other occasions. Easy to hang them on the ceiling, walls and branches to decorate your engagement party
description: Engagement banners create a pleasant and warm atmosphere for your engagement party Specification: Name: Engagement Banner Material: Gold foil paper Color：Gold Quantity: 4 (2 pcs banner + 2 rolls of rope) Size: Engagement banner length: 100cm/39.37in Engagement letter height: 18cm/7.08in Triangular banner length: 100cm/39.37in Single triangle size: 13*18cm/5.11*7.08in Ribbon length: 300cm/118.11in Weight: 67g Use: Engagement party decoration The package contains: 1 * 1 m engaged banner 1 * 1m triangular banner 2 * 3m ropes Warming Notes: 1.Due to manual measurement, there may be a slight error in size and weight. 2.Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item.
